name: solo-npm
description: Nine slash commands for AI-driven solo-dev npm publishing — covering the full release lifecycle. Bootstrap: /solo-npm:init scaffolds release.yml (with dist-tag detection) + publishConfig + .nvmrc + consumer wrappers + .solo-npm/state.json + .claude/settings.json (idempotent); /solo-npm:trust configures OIDC Trusted Publishing across packages via the npm-trust CLI. Per-release: /solo-npm:release is the universal release entry (auto-chains to /solo-npm:prerelease on pre-release version); /solo-npm:verify runs lint + typecheck + test + build. Lifecycle transitions: /solo-npm:prerelease handles start/bump/promote pre-release lifecycle (alpha/beta/rc); /solo-npm:hotfix patches previous stable majors on a <major>.x branch with dist-tag-aware publish. Portfolio operations: /solo-npm:status shows a one-page dashboard; /solo-npm:audit runs security audit with risk triage; /solo-npm:deps orchestrates dep upgrades with verify gates. /solo-npm:release and /solo-npm:verify are designed to be wrapped per-repo via .claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md thin wrappers. /solo-npm:hotfix and /solo-npm:deps compose with addyosmani/agent-skills' debugging-and-error-recovery when installed.
